# Generated by tools/m7_war.py --write; M7 removes vanilla unit and levy unlocks.
# Non-unit advance content is retained verbatim until M8 replaces the full tree.
expansionist_ambitions = {
	age = age_2_renaissance
	icon = imperial_ambitions

	potential = {
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:south_slavic_group }
		country_rank = country_rank:rank_empire
		AND = {
			num_locations > 0
			capital = { region = region:balkan_region }
		}
	}

	global_integration_speed_modifier = 0.1
	
	requires = gunpowder_advance
}

poklisars = {
	age = age_3_discovery 
	icon = poklisars

	potential = {
		AND = {
			num_locations > 0
			OR = {
				capital = { region = region:balkan_region }
				capital = { region = region:carpathia_region }
			}
		}
		OR = {
			culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:romanian_group }
			culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:south_slavic_group }
			culture = culture:dalmatian
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:dalmatian }
		}
	}

	monthly_diplomats = 0.1
	
	requires = improved_book_binding
}

balkan_hajduks = {
	age = age_5_absolutism 
	icon = balkan_hajduks

	potential = {
		AND = {
			num_locations > 0
			OR = {
				capital = { region = region:balkan_region }
				capital = { region = region:carpathia_region }
			}
			OR = {
				culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:hungarian_group }
				culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:romanian_group }
				culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:south_slavic_group }
				culture = culture:dalmatian
				culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:dalmatian }
			}
		}
	}


	requires = supply_depot_advance_age_5_absolutism
}


cro_pandurs_recruitment = {
	age = age_6_revolutions
	icon = expansionism

	potential = {
		AND = {
			num_locations > 0
			OR = {
				capital = { region = region:balkan_region }
				capital = { region = region:carpathia_region }
			}
			OR = {
				culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:hungarian_group }
				culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:romanian_group }
				culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:south_slavic_group }
				culture = culture:dalmatian
				culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:dalmatian }
			}
		}
	}


	requires = napoleonic_warfare
}
